name: pi-glm-usage
description_en: A pi extension that displays z.ai (GLM Coding Plan) subscription quota usage in the status bar. Shows 5-hour and weekly quota percentages, plan level, and reset times. Updates every 60 seconds during agent runs.
description_zh: pi 扩展，在状态栏中显示 z.ai (GLM Coding Plan) 订阅配额使用情况。显示 5 小时和每周配额百分比、计划级别和重置时间。在代理运行期间每 60 秒更新一次。
